INSERT INTO test_query_hash VALUES ('SELECT * FROM table1 WHERE id = 1');
INSERT INTO test_query_hash VALUES ('SELECT * FROM table2 WHERE name = ''John''');
INSERT INTO test_query_hash VALUES ('SELECT * FROM table3 JOIN table4 ON table3.id = table4.id');
INSERT INTO test_query_hash VALUES ('SELECT COUNT(*) FROM table5 GROUP BY category HAVING COUNT(*) > 1');
INSERT INTO test_query_hash VALUES ('SELECT normalizedQueryHash(''SELECT * FROM table1 WHERE id = 1'')');
SELECT normalizedQueryHash('SELECT * FROM table1 WHERE id = 1') AS hash1, normalizedQueryHash('SELECT * FROM table1 WHERE id = 2') AS hash2;
SELECT normalizedQueryHash('SELECT x FROM (SELECT id AS x FROM table2 WHERE age > 30) AS subquery') AS subquery_hash;
SELECT normalizedQueryHash('SELECT * FROM table3 JOIN table4 ON table3.id = table4.id WHERE table3.age < 25') AS join_hash;
SELECT normalizedQueryHash('SELECT department, AVG(salary) FROM employees GROUP BY department') AS group_by_hash;
SELECT normalizedQueryHash('SELECT a.id, b.value FROM tableA a INNER JOIN tableB b ON a.id = b.id WHERE a.status = ''active'' AND b.amount > 1000') AS complex_query_hash;
SELECT normalizedQueryHash('SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM nested_table) AS nested') AS nested_query_hash;
SELECT normalizedQueryHash('SELECT normalizedQueryHash(''SELECT 1'') AS hash1, normalizedQueryHash(''SELECT 2'') AS hash2') AS nested_normalized_hash;
